'''dhazhacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhappan|jhappan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhappan|jhappan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzhæchæth|dhæzhæchæth]] || [[word:dhæzhæchæj|dhæzhæchæj]] || [[word:dhæzhæchæsh|dhæzhæchæsh]] || [[word:dhæzhæchæ|dhæzhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhazhachath|dhazhazhachath]] || [[word:dhazhazhachaj|dhazhazhachaj]] || [[word:dhazhazhachash|dhazhazhachash]] || [[word:dhazhazhacha|dhazhazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhachath|dhazhachath]] || [[word:dhazhachaj|dhazhachaj]] || [[word:dhazhachash|dhazhachash]] || [[word:dhazhacha|dhazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhafchath|dhazhafchath]] || [[word:dhazhafchaj|dhazhafchaj]] || [[word:dhazhafchash|dhazhafchash]] || [[word:dhazhafchaf|dhazhafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazhachatha|dhazhachatha]] || [[word:dhazhachaja|dhazhachaja]] || [[word:dhazhachasha|dhazhachasha]] || [[word:dhazhachaka|dhazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazhachath|dhazhachath]] || [[word:dhazhachaj|dhazhachaj]] || [[word:dhazhachash|dhazhachash]] || [[word:dhazhacha|dhazhacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazhachathal|dhazhachathal]] || [[word:dhazhachajal|dhazhachajal]] || [[word:dhazhachashal|dhazhachashal]] || [[word:dhazhachakal|dhazhachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazhachathatha|dhazhachathatha]] || [[word:dhazhachajaja|dhazhachajaja]] || [[word:dhazhachashasha|dhazhachashasha]] || [[word:dhazhachaka|dhazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazhachathan|dhazhachathan]] || [[word:dhazhachajan|dhazhachajan]] || [[word:dhazhachashan|dhazhachashan]] || [[word:dhazhachakan|dhazhachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazhachathaoro|dhazhachathaoro]] || [[word:dhazhachajaoro|dhazhachajaoro]] || [[word:dhazhachashaoro|dhazhachashaoro]] || [[word:dhazhachakaoro|dhazhachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
